summary: Session 4 of 4 (FINAL): operator UAT gate + 0.29.0 release. Operator preliminary ad-hoc UAT on a local build passed every walked row; two operator feedback items were folded in BEFORE the gate closed: (A) the copied session-set decomposition prompt now REFERENCES docs/planning/project-plan.md instead of inlining the plan text (readability; path-aware-assistant contract per the Set 048 copyable-prompt precedent; buildSessionGenPrompt dropped its planText param, the dangling-reference guard stays), and (B) the Getting Started form's tier radio now rides the build-session-sets action (narrowed like build-structure, default full) so the prompt's worked exemplars + an operator-tier guidance line steer the planner to the selected tier (the bare palette command stays generic Full). Operator re-walked the affected rows on the rebuilt dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.29.0.vsix (990.81 KB), confirmed the prompt fix, passed the gate, and explicitly authorized the Marketplace publish in-session; results recorded in 060-getting-started-redesign-uat-checklist.json. Version finalized at 0.29.0 - the package.json+lock bump and base CHANGELOG entry were found PRE-WRITTEN uncommitted in the working tree (authored out-of-band for the operator's UAT build); kept, extended with the S4 entries, dated 2026-06-11. repository-reference.md release status updated (and stale 'held' wording corrected on the ALREADY-PUBLISHED ext 0.28.0 / router v0.16.0 / v0.15.0 rows, verified via gh run list; committed-VSIX file-map row repointed 0.13.3 -> 0.29.0). change-log.md authored (final-session gate). NO PyPI release: ai_router packaged surface unchanged since published v0.16.0. Release mechanics: vsix-v0.29.0 tag push (publish-vscode.yml) follows this close-out, operator-authorized; a small post-publish follow-up commit records the run outcome. 699 TS unit tests passing (2 pre-existing Set-026 stub failures); tsc + esbuild clean. Set 061 candidates captured in change-log.md (Explorer UX polish: N/M+ Lightweight dedicated-sessions fraction, tier visibility, quieter BLOCKED-BY-PREREQS marker + tooltip, Switch-tier action on not-started sets).
verification_notes: Cross-provider verification routed to gpt-5-4 (OpenAI), 2 rounds, $0.1500 total. R1 ($0.1438) ISSUES_FOUND with one Major (S060-S4-V1-001): release docs overstated the held-release state - repository-reference.md and change-log.md said the vsix-v0.29.0 tag was already 'pushed 2026-06-11' although the push follows verification + close-out. FIXED: both documents reworded to the truthful pre-push state (UAT passed, publish operator-authorized in-session, tag push follows close-out; the 'published + run id' facts land in a post-publish follow-up commit only after publish-vscode.yml completes). R2 ($0.0062) VERIFIED the fix. Structured findings persisted to s4-issues.json (schemaVersion 2, resolution_status fixed, resolved_in_round 2). The environment-variable loss mid-session (provider keys vanished from the shell snapshot; recovered by reloading the Windows User environment into the process per the CLAUDE.md bootstrap note) did not affect any artifact.
